description: Large bifolio of accounts. In Judaeo-Arabic. Concerning various goods brought to Tripoli (Libya?). Erratic spelling, and written in a local dialect. Dating: Probably 11th century or earlier. Seems to concern local trade in Tripoli. (Information in part from Goitein’s index card.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
